tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within or very close to normal ranges, except for a minimally elevated chloride, which is likely not clinically significant in isolation. Glycemic control (HbA1c, glucose) and renal function (urea, creatinine) are normal. No acute or chronic metabolic disturbances are evident from these results. Overall, the findings are unremarkable from a laboratory perspective.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civico Renzetti Lanciano
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
